include: # category : restaurant | cafe | bar | food | shop | outdoor | attraction | ski
#            leave a day BLANK = closed that day;  write 'open' if open with

# hours    : OPTIONAL display override — leave blank to use the auto text;
#            fill only for custom wording (e.g. a place with two venues).
#            text here (e.g. "Open year-round") and are never greyed out.
# seasonal : free text about months/season; drives the 12-month open strip.
# include  : yes (or blank) shows it; no/false/0 hides without deleting.
